parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 1024, tools: [{ type: 'web_search_20250305', name: 'web_search' }], system: 'You are a market researcher for Cipher Studio. Search for trending ebook topics on Amazon KDP in these niches: AI tools for small business, freelancer productivity, Etsy seller guides, automation and no-code tools. For each topic found, return the title pattern, estimated competition level (low/medium/high), and price range you observed. Return ONLY valid JSON array.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Search Amazon KDP now for trending ebook topics in the specified niches. Return your findings as a JSON array where each element has: title_pattern, competition_level, price_range.' }] }) }}
={{ (() => { const text = $json.content[0].text.trim(); const clean = text.startsWith('```') ? text.replace(/^```[a-z]*\n?/,'').replace(/```$/,'').trim() : text; return clean; })() }}
